category_sources: Official ITK homepage describes scientific image analysis, processing, segmentation, and registration.
source_facts.description says Insight Toolkit performs registration and segmentation.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses ITK and Insight Toolkit.
docs_sources: Official docs site is titled ITK's documentation and provides tutorials, examples, API, and guides.
Official homepage links to docs.itk.org as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/InsightSoftwareConsortium/ITK, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official docs describe ITK as an N-dimensional scientific image processing, segmentation, and registration toolkit.
source_facts.description identifies registration and segmentation functionality.
